data.body: [operator-attested evidence] Landed on main via Gerrit two-vote gate: change 732 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/732, commit d0f2d81a9), LLM-Review +1 by rebar-review-bot @ 2026-07-16 03:47:53 | Verified +1 by rebar-ci-bot @ 2026-07-16 03:56:11; submitted -> MERGED. make lint+typecheck+test green (CI Verified run 29469622534). Extended beyond the ACs: also de-literaled the same stale 'SCHEMA_VERSION (currently 3)' in docs/event-schema.md (actual value 5) so no drift-prone version literal remains in either doc.
